steps.text: Good morning! Let's get {toy} ready for a {slot} parade.
Line up three of your favorite things for {toy} to march past.
March around the room with {toy}, calling out what you see.
Pick the silliest object from the parade and give it a name.
Take a bow with {toy} — the {slot} parade was a hit!
{toy} has heard rumors of a {slot} hidden in this very room.
Search high for clues — check shelves and tables.
Search low for clues — check under the couch and in baskets.
Bring three clues back to {toy} and arrange them on the floor.
Together, decide what the clues mean and where the {slot} must be!
{toy} wants to put on a small puppet show about {slot}.
Build a stage from a couch cushion or a chair seat.
Pick two helper toys to play the other characters.
Act out the story — what happens when {toy} meets the {slot}?
Take a bow together. The audience claps for {toy}!
Curl up somewhere cozy with {toy}.
Whisper a secret about {slot} to {toy}.
Imagine {slot} on a calm, slow adventure — picture it together.
Tell {toy} one favorite thing about today.
Give {toy} a gentle goodnight squeeze.
Hold {toy} up high and announce the {slot} dance party!
Pick a song or hum a tune for {toy} to dance to.
Spin around three times with {toy}.
Freeze like a statue when {toy} says STOP!
Bow to {toy} and end the dance party with a giggle.
{toy} just had a brilliant idea for a brand-new {slot} invention.
Gather two everyday objects from nearby — they're the parts.
Help {toy} build the invention by stacking, leaning, or arranging the parts.
Give the invention a name and tell {toy} what it does.
Pretend to switch it on — what happens? Show {toy} the result!
{toy} wants to explore — pick the room you're in as the new {slot} world.
Find one thing tall, one thing soft, and one thing colorful.
Walk {toy} on a tour past each thing and describe it out loud.
Pick the most surprising one and tell {toy} a quick story about it.
Bring {toy} back to home base and write the discovery in the explorer's log (or just say it aloud).
{toy} wants to lead a {adjective} {action_verb} parade through {room}.
Show {toy} how to {action_verb} — first {action_verb} {count} times in place.
Now {action_verb} all the way across {room}, holding {toy} high.
Turn around and {action_verb} back, this time wiggling your {body_part}.
Bow to {toy} — the {adjective} parade is complete!
{toy} has heard there's a {adjective} {prop} hidden somewhere in {room}.
Search high and low — check {count} different spots while {toy} watches.
When you find a {prop}, hold it up and let {toy} inspect it.
Decide together: is it the {adjective} one? Make {toy} nod yes or shake no.
Celebrate the discovery — give {toy} a victory wiggle of your {body_part}!
{toy} is putting on a {adjective} show and tell in {room}.
Pick a {prop} — that's the first thing {toy} will introduce.
Have {toy} {action_verb} up to the audience (your {body_part} count as the audience).
Announce three {adjective} facts about the {prop} — make them up if you have to!
Take a bow with {toy}. The {adjective} show was a hit!
